revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

means a device, system or service, external to a vessel, designed and operated to enhance safe and efficient navigation of individual vessels and vessel traffic. For the purpose of the Organization (IALA) this definition includes Vessel Traffic Services Other forms: Aids to Navigation (plural), AtoN ''This definition of the term Aid to Navigation is in accordance with the IALA Constitution.
The use of the definition from the original IALA Dictionary has been discontinued.'' {{languages|Marine Aid to Navigation}} [[Category:1.1 Basic Terms]] [[Category:Alphabetical Index]] [[Category:IALA Dictionary 2016 Revision]] [[Category:Approved by DWG]] [[Category:IALA Dictionary 2023 Revision]]
